stemHtml: Which one of the following statements is true regarding icing on a propeller?

options.a: Icing can cause a reduction of 30% of thrust on the outer 2 thirds of the propeller blade due to the thinner leading edge.
options.b: Icing can cause a reduction of 20% of thrust in the inner part of the propeller blade.
options.c: Ice cannot build up on the propeller.
options.d: Regarding the entire aircraft, propeller icing is the most critical.
